Mona Booth, Topeka, Kansas passed away November 2018.
born October 1930, Wichita, Kansas, daughter Laura Bradbury.
Mona graduated from Southwestern College Winfield, Kansas.
married Clyde Booth Leroy, Kansas July 1956.
taught elementary education Tecumseh North Elementary School Tecumseh, Kansas.
enjoyed researching genealogy active member Tecumseh United Methodist Church.
Mona survived Clyde, loving husband years; sons: Trent Booth wife Omaha, Nebraska Tracy Booth wife Leslie Louis, Missouri; granddaughter, Sarah Booth step-granddaughter, Wang; sister Neva Woerner Greeley, Colorado; many nieces nephews.
preceded death parents sister Wanda Donley.
Memorial services will held Saturday November 2018 11:00AM Tecumseh United Methodist Church, Tecumseh
Tecumseh, 66542.
